Mayo-based freight service

Dependable Weekend Freight Between Mayo and Whitehorse

Weekend freight runs, Whitehorse supplier pickups, and practical delivery support for businesses, contractors, and local customers on the Silver Trail.

Request a Quote Common Questions

What We Do

Focused freight coordination on the Mayo–Whitehorse corridor. One route, done well.

Weekend Freight Runs

Dependable scheduled freight service between Mayo and Whitehorse for businesses, organizations, contractors, and local customers who need a reliable weekend supply link.

Request Quote

Whitehorse Supplier Pickups

Pickup service from Whitehorse suppliers, retailers, and service providers, coordinated for delivery back to Mayo.

Request Quote

Business Restock Delivery

Recurring or as-needed freight support for Mayo businesses that need stock, supplies, parts, or operational materials moved from Whitehorse.

Request Quote

Contractor & Project Freight

Freight coordination for contractors, site work, maintenance teams, and project-based operations needing materials, tools, or supplies moved on the Mayo–Whitehorse route.

Request Quote

Custom Freight Requests

Need something outside the standard run? Contact 40 Mile Supply for custom freight coordination, special handling questions, or one-off transport requests.

Request Quote

How It Works

Simple process, clear communication.

1

Request a Quote

Tell us what you need to move, when, and where. We'll respond with clear next steps.

2

Confirm Details

We confirm pickup location, contact, and any special instructions.

3

Weekend Run

Your freight moves on our scheduled weekend run between Mayo and Whitehorse.

4

Delivery

We deliver to your chosen location. Straightforward and done.

Need freight moved between Mayo and Whitehorse?

Get in touch for a quote or to ask about upcoming weekend runs.

Get a Freight Quote Call Us
